'''Gar''' was a resident of [[Annoo (Gelefil)|Annoo]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He helped out on [[Demma Moll]]'s farm and became part of her [[Annoo resistance|resistance movement]].
